app.title: GeoGrid Planner
app.subtitle: Geometry and grid calculator for 2D shapes

home.title: Calculate shapes, grids, intersections, and derived metrics.
home.description: The project is structured to gradually add new shapes, metrics, and visualization modes without rewriting the whole calculation flow.
home.triangleDescription: First stable scenario: triangle sides, area, perimeter, and SVG preview.
home.trapezoidDescription: Planned next scenario for bases, side lengths, grid lines, and intersections.

footer.disclaimer: Calculations may include rounding errors or depend on the entered data. For important engineering decisions, verify the results independently.

triangle.description: This is the first basic stage: resolve a triangle by three sides and show the first metrics.
triangle.invalid: A triangle cannot be built from these side lengths.
triangle.title: Triangle calculator
